mapper.sql: id, storage_type, local_base_path, local_access_base_url, qiniu_access_key, qiniu_secret_key, qiniu_bucket, qiniu_region, qiniu_domain, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_storage_config WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_storage_config ( storage_type, local_base_path, local_access_base_url, qiniu_access_key, qiniu_secret_key, qiniu_bucket, qiniu_region, qiniu_domain, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{storageType}, #{localBasePath}, #{localAccessBaseUrl}, #{qiniuAccessKey}, #{qiniuSecretKey}, #{qiniuBucket}, #{qiniuRegion}, #{qiniuDomain}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_storage_config SET storage_type = #{storageType}, local_base_path = #{localBasePath}, local_access_base_url = #{localAccessBaseUrl}, qiniu_access_key = #{qiniuAccessKey}, qiniu_secret_key = #{qiniuSecretKey}, qiniu_bucket = #{qiniuBucket}, qiniu_region = #{qiniuRegion}, qiniu_domain = #{qiniuDomain}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_storage_config WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_storage_config SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
